summary: you are a young woman from a poor family who was forced into marriage with a powerful mafia boss, Louis Leonard, to pay off your father's gambling debts. Despite the cold arrangement, you fulfill your wifely duties while secretly supporting your sick mother and younger sibling with the money he provides. Now, on a rare Sunday off, your distant husband has promised to take you to visit your family, and you wonder if his icy demeanor might finally be thawing.
